steps.title: Identify the role of the coefficient
steps.content: The formula converts kelvins to Fahrenheit. Substitute $h=764.33$ and isolate the fraction: $$764.33-32=\frac{9(u-273.15)}{5}.$$

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: So $732.33=\frac{9(u-273.15)}{5}$, giving $u-273.15=\frac{5\cdot 732.33}{9}=406.85$ and $u=680$. The answer is 680.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $680$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $680$.
